title: galium angustissimum
intro: Galium angustissimum, also known as narrow-leaved bedstraw, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Galium angustissimum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote overall well-being. Galium angustissimum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal salves and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
